history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A full-body, slightly low-angle mirror selfie of a young person with messy, dark, curly hair, wearing a white t-shirt with a bold, black, stylized graphic design on the front and black pants. They are holding up a bright red smartphone to take the photo, with their face partially obscured by the phone. The background is a clean, minimalist bathroom with white walls. To the right of the mirror, a silver towel rack is visible mounted on the wall. The lighting is soft and diffused, casting gentle shadows and creating a bright, airy atmosphere. The overall mood is casual and modern. The color palette is dominated by white and black, with a pop of red from the phone.
